meta.name: azure-k3s-cluster
meta.description: Azure ARM template to deploy a lightweight Kubernetes cluster using k3s.

diagram_inline:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 640 220" width="640" height="220">
  <style>
    @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
      .bg { fill: #111520; }
      .box { fill: #1a1e2a; stroke: #2a3040; }
      .box-accent { fill: #0d1e38; stroke: #2b5cb0; }
      .box-b { fill: #0d2220; stroke: #207060; }
      .box-warm { fill: #221a10; stroke: #a06020; }
      .box-purple { fill: #1a0d28; stroke: #7030a0; }
      .label { fill: #d0daf0; }
      .sub { fill: #5070a0; }
      .arrow { stroke: #3a5070; fill: none; }
      .arr-accent { stroke: #2b5cb0; fill: none; }
      .bg-fill { fill: #111520; }
    }
    @media (prefers-color-scheme: light) {
      .bg { fill: #f0f4fa; }
      .box { fill: #ffffff; stroke: #c8d0e0; }
      .box-accent { fill: #dbeafe; stroke: #3b82f6; }
      .box-b { fill: #d1fae5; stroke: #059669; }
      .box-warm { fill: #fef3c7; stroke: #d97706; }
      .box-purple { fill: #ede9fe; stroke: #7c3aed; }
      .label { fill: #1a2a40; }
      .sub { fill: #5070a0; }
      .arrow { stroke: #90a8c0; fill: none; }
      .arr-accent { stroke: #3b82f6; fill: none; }
      .bg-fill { fill: #f0f4fa; }
    }
    text { font-family: -apple-system,"Segoe UI",Helvetica,sans-serif; }
    .label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; }
    .sub { font-size: 11px; }
  </style>
  <defs>
    <marker id="arr" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" refX="6" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L0,6 L8,3 z" class="arrow" style="fill:currentColor;stroke:none"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect x="20" y="80" width="100" height="60" rx="8" class="box-warm"/>
  <text x="70" y="113" text-anchor="middle" class="label">Makefile</text>
  <text x="70" y="128" text-anchor="middle" class="sub">az CLI wrapper</text>
  <rect x="180" y="20" width="130" height="60" rx="8" class="box-accent"/>
  <text x="245" y="53" text-anchor="middle" class="label">ARM Template</text>
  <text x="245" y="68" text-anchor="middle" class="sub">VNet · NSG · VMs</text>
  <rect x="180" y="120" width="130" height="60" rx="8" class="box"/>
  <text x="245" y="153" text-anchor="middle" class="label">Key Vault</text>
  <text x="245" y="168" text-anchor="middle" class="sub">join token secret</text>
  <rect x="400" y="20" width="110" height="60" rx="8" class="box-b"/>
  <text x="455" y="53" text-anchor="middle" class="label">k3s server</text>
  <text x="455" y="68" text-anchor="middle" class="sub">Raft leader</text>
  <rect x="400" y="120" width="110" height="60" rx="8" class="box"/>
  <text x="455" y="153" text-anchor="middle" class="label">k3s agents</text>
  <text x="455" y="168" text-anchor="middle" class="sub">VMSS workers</text>
  <line x1="120" y1="100" x2="180" y2="60" class="arrow" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <line x1="120" y1="115" x2="180" y2="150" class="arrow" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <line x1="310" y1="50" x2="400" y2="50" class="arr-accent" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <line x1="310" y1="150" x2="400" y2="150" class="arrow" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <line x1="455" y1="80" x2="455" y2="120" class="arrow" stroke-width="1.5"/>
</svg>
